subject: Rajasthan History
question_hi: राजस्थान मुगल मंत्री मुख्य राजस्थान मध्ये बने थे।
explanation_en:
Akbar was one of the Mughal emperors who ruled Rajasthan. Rajasthan was part of the Mughal Empire during his reign.

राजस्थान मुगल मंत्री मुख्य राजस्थान मध्ये बन थे।
explanation_hi: राजस्थान मुगल मंत्री मुख्य राजस्थान मध्ये बन थे।

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which festival is celebrated in Rajasthan during winter season?
question_hi: राजस्थान के बेसांचा आवश्या वर्षिक समावर्त्ती आवश्या वर्षिक समावर्त्ती
explanation_en: Pushkar Fair, also known as Pushkar Camel Fair, is a famous festival celebrated in Rajasthan.
